name: vendor-performance-intelligence-engine
description: Multi-signal behavioral vendor scoring — composite risk score per vendor per tenant, explainable, rules-driven.

tools.name: register_tenant
tools.description: Create a new tenant and return an API key (gated by SELF_REGISTRATION_ENABLED).

tools.name: push_signal
tools.description: Push one signal or a batch to the ingestion pipeline.

tools.name: get_vendor_score
tools.description: Get the current composite score for a vendor including band, trend, category breakdown, and top 5 contributors.

tools.name: list_alerts
tools.description: List risk band-change alerts, filterable by status, band, or vendor.

tools.name: preview_scoring_rules
tools.description: Preview band-change deltas on a sample vendor set before activating a new scoring rule.

tools.name: generate_report
tools.description: Queue a report: vendor_scorecard, portfolio_risk, retender_candidates, or trend_analysis.
